text:
No action required.** This is the known CLI-mode false positive — already documented in LEARNINGS.MD.

The
"Connection refused 127.0.0.1:8000" error is expected when running in CLI mode. The
`AddTaskTraceTool` makes HTTP calls to the backend API on every `add_task_trace` invocation; when no backend server is listening, all agents log this error.

It is **non-fatal** — agents complete their tasks successfully regardless.

**Rule
applied:** `Connection refused 127.0.0.1:8000 is expected in CLI mode` (confidence: high)
